anthropic.description: Provider-neutral bundle for Claude-style agents that can consume CLAUDE.md, slash commands, and Markdown skills.

continue.description: Provider-neutral Markdown bundle for Continue-style assistant contexts.

cursor.description: Provider-neutral Markdown bundle for Cursor project-rule adaptation.

deepseek.description: Provider-neutral Markdown bundle for DeepSeek-based coding agents.

generic.description: Provider-neutral bundle containing SKILL.md files, references, commands, prompts, index, profiles, and provider metadata.

github-copilot.description: Provider-neutral Markdown bundle suitable for Copilot-adjacent repository instruction workflows.

google-gemini.description: Provider-neutral Markdown bundle for Gemini-style agents or custom Gemini CLI integrations.

mistral.description: Provider-neutral Markdown bundle for Mistral-based agent runtimes.

ollama.description: Provider-neutral local-model bundle for Ollama-backed agent runtimes.

openai.description: Provider-neutral bundle for OpenAI/Codex-style agents that can consume repository instructions and Markdown skills.

qwen.description: Provider-neutral Markdown bundle for Qwen-based coding agents.

windsurf.description: Provider-neutral Markdown bundle for Windsurf/Cascade rule adaptation.

zed.description: Provider-neutral Markdown bundle for Zed agent rule adaptation.
